header.intro: Every critical change to a profile runs through a validation flow: human review, cross-checking against 10+ sports sources and verification with artificial intelligence. See the process step by step.
header.introMobile: Every critical change to a profile runs through a validation flow: human review, cross-checking against 10+ sports sources and verification with artificial intelligence.

captions.title: The player submits a <hl>request</hl>
captions.body: From their dashboard, the player or their agent requests a change to their career history, stats or media. Nothing goes live on its own: everything enters review.
captions.mockSlot: Coming soon: recording of the real “add stage + submit request” flow.

captions.title: It reaches the <hl>Admin Panel</hl>
captions.body: The request enters the 'BallersHub team's review queue. An administrator picks it up and opens the player's file to start verifying.
captions.mockSlot: Coming soon: recording of the team's review panel.

captions.title: Cross-checked across <hl>10+ sources</hl>
captions.body: The flow opens up and queries the world's leading sports platforms in parallel. Only what matches across multiple recognized sources moves forward.

captions.title: Validation with <hl>AI agents</hl>
captions.body: The flow branches out to three AI models that cross-check the data independently, detect inconsistencies and return a confidence level. Consensus reinforces the decision.

captions.title: The team <hl>approves or rejects</hl>
captions.body: With the source cross-check and the AI consensus, the administrator makes the final decision. If everything matches, it's approved. If not, it comes back with detailed feedback.
captions.approveSub: The data matches sources and AI.
captions.rejectSub: Comes back with detailed feedback to fix.

captions.title: The change is <hl>published</hl>
captions.body: The verified data is published on the player's public profile, ready to share with clubs and scouts. Traceable and backed by real evidence.

recap.title: Request
recap.desc: The player or agent requests a change.

recap.title: Admin Panel
recap.desc: It enters the team's review queue.

recap.title: AI Validation
recap.desc: Gemini, Claude and ChatGPT cross-check the data.

recap.title: Decision
recap.desc: It's approved or comes back with feedback.

recap.title: Published
recap.desc: The verified data goes to the public profile.

cta.body: Create your professional profile and let every data point speak with real backing.
